chunks.raw_text:
Repository: halo-dev/halo
Release: 2.22.0-alpha.1
Tag: v2.22.0-alpha.1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-12-12T03:42:09Z; created_at: 2025-12-12T02:53:13Z
Release notes:
## ⚠️ 提示
此版本为 2.22.0 的早期版本，不适用于生产环境。这个版本部分功能的内部实现做了较大变更，同时包含了部分插件 API 的变动，发布此版本的主要目的是为了可以让社区的插件和主题开发者提前适配。
插件和主题的 API 变更可查阅：[插件 API 变更日志](https://docs.halo.run/next/developer-guide/plugin/api-changelog) / [主题 API 变更日志](https://docs.halo.run/next/developer-guide/theme/api-changelog)
> 由于 UI 的依赖库还未发布到 npm，暂时可以使用在 [pkg.pr.new](https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/actions/workflows/packages-preview-release.yaml) 中构建的版本。
## 新特性
- 为编辑器新增画廊（图片集）功能 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7897>
- 用户注册支持设置受保护用户名 by @liuyiwuqing in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7887>
- 编辑器的图片、视频、音频支持添加描述文本 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7875>
- 重构编辑器拖拽功能，并为其增加功能操作菜单 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7861>
- 编辑器支持使用中文符号、唤起建议菜单 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7840>
- 支持在文章编辑页面设置封面图 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7809>
- 支持为附件存储策略设置在上传界面的显示优先级 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7805>
- 支持在附件上传界面隐藏部分存储策略 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7792>
## 功能优化
- 清理通知发送所残留的无用数据 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8007>
- 当首页没有使用文章列表变量时，不再查询数据库，以提升性能 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8006>
- 用户密码允许输入 . 和 ? by @xzyone in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8005>
- 为阻塞操作添加超时时间以提升系统可靠性 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8004>
- 优化编辑器的整体样式和交互逻辑 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7982>
- 优化 Console 和 UC 的加载速度 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7976> <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7971> <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7941> <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7935>
- 提升 Console 端代码输入框的渲染速度 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7956> <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7932>
- 优化个人中心身份认证设置，将三方登录与两步认证合并到一个选项卡 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7950>
- Console 和 UC 支持异步加载所需语言包，提升首屏加载速度 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7931>
- 懒加载 Console 和 UC 的部分路由，优化首屏渲染速度 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7930>
- 文章设置中选择作者时支持显示用户名 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7904>
- 修复离线环境下，Console 无法请求接口的问题 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7848>
- 解决生成缩略图时可能出现内存溢出的问题 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7817>
- 支持配置缩略图生成启用、禁用和并发量 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7812>
- 为编辑器的命令面板添加插入图片的选项 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7803>
- 重构图片缩略图功能，移除缩略图记录，改为按需生成 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7779>
- 新增 Shiki 代码高亮和超链接卡片预设插件 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7785>
## 问题修复
- 解决无法在编辑器中插入视频的问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7986>
- 修复可能无法初始化主题配置的问题 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7923>
- 修复潜在的内存泄漏问题 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7914>
- 优化重置密码时因邮箱可输入大小写导致的问题 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7901>
- 解决切换代码块语言时编辑器页面不正常跳动的问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7839>
- 修复可能无法正常获取附件链接的问题 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7788>
## 依赖更新
- 升级 Spring Boot 至 3.5.7 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7871>
- 升级 Tiptap 至 3.x by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7811>
## 开发者相关
- 修复 `@halo-dev/components` 的 Dropdown 组件类型问题 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7974>
- 将 `@halo-dev/console-shared` 重命名为 `@halo-dev/ui-shared` by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7926>
- `@halo-dev/console-shared` 包提供 `utils.id.uuid()` 方法，用于生成 uuid by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/7898>
- 在 `@halo-dev/console-shared` 包中提供 `stores` 对象，包含 currentUser 和 globalInfo by @r...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the halo-dev/halo release v2.22.0-alpha.1, the release note introduces new features including a gallery (image collection) function for the editor, support for setting protected usernames during registration, adding description text to images, videos, and audio in the editor, refactored editor drag functionality with an operation menu, support for Chinese symbols and suggestion menus in the editor, setting cover images on the article editing page, setting display priority for attachment storage policies on the upload interface, and hiding some storage policies on the attachment upload interface. Optimizations include cleaning up residual data from notification sending, skipping database queries when the homepage does not use article list variables, allowing '.' and '?' in user passwords, adding timeouts to blocking operations, optimizing editor styles and interactions, improving Console and UC loading speeds, enhancing Console code input box rendering speed, merging third-party login and two-step authentication into one tab in personal center identity settings, asynchronous loading of language packs for Console and UC, lazy loading of some routes, displaying usernames when selecting authors in article settings, fixing offline Console interface requests, solving potential memory overflow during thumbnail generation, configuring thumbnail generation enable/disable and concurrency, adding insert image option to editor command palette, refactoring image thumbnail functionality to generate on demand instead of storing records, and adding Shiki code highlighting and hyperlink card preset plugins. Fixes include resolving inability to insert videos in the editor, potential theme configuration initialization failure, potential memory leak, password reset case sensitivity, abnormal page jump when switching code block languages, and potential failure to obtain attachment links. Dependency updates include upgrading Spring Boot to 3.5.7 and Tiptap to 3.x. Developer-related changes include fixing Dropdown component type issues, renaming @halo-dev/console-shared to @halo-dev/ui-shared, providing a uuid generation method, and providing stores object with currentUser and globalInfo.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the halo-dev/halo release v2.22.0-alpha.2, the release note describes optimizations such as reducing the height of the cover in the article editor and supporting image expansion, optimizing image size settings in the editor by not setting a default height, and supporting manual editing of icon information in FormKit Iconify. It fixes an issue where the editor search and replace box position was incorrect. Developer-related changes include FormKit Iconify supporting display of iconify data, fixing an issue where multiple Array input types in a form caused display anomalies, and supporting configuration of the expansion position for FormKit Iconify input boxes.

Fixes include resolving inability to insert videos in the editor, potential theme configuration initialization failure, potential memory leak, password reset case sensitivity, abnormal page jump when switching code block languages, and potential failure to obtain attachment links. Dependency updates include upgrading Spring Boot to 3.5.7 and 3.5.9, and Tiptap to 3.x. Developer-related changes include fixing @halo-dev/components Dropdown component type issues, renaming @halo-dev/console-shared to @halo-dev/ui-shared, providing a uuid generation method, providing stores object with currentUser and globalInfo, and other changes.

Release notes:
## ⚠️ 提示
此版本为 2.23.0 的测试版本，不建议在生产环境升级，同时在测试时需要注意以下事项：
- 此版本升级了 Spring Boot 4 版本，已知有少部分插件不兼容，包括应用市场插件，**建议在升级 Halo 前先升级应用市场插件（1.16.0）**
- 建议升级 Halo 之后检查是否有异常的插件，如有异常，请向插件作者报告
## 新特性
- 为主题和插件的设置页面添加滚动到顶部按钮 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8347>
- 为编辑器中的图片添加 **应用宽度至全文** 的功能 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8338>
- 支持在文章设置中设置作者页文章显示条数 by @AR-26710 in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8304>
- 支持对比文章版本 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8272>
## 功能优化
- 允许在新建菜单项时，移除选中的上级菜单 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8364>
- 系统设置中的保留用户名支持同时应用于显示名称 by @AR-26710 in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8310>
- Console 仪表盘新增点赞数量小部件 by @Copilot in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8271>
- 优化 Console 端评论管理的默认排序，优先显示最近有回复的评论 by @Copilot in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8371>
## 问题修复
- 解决 FormKit Iconify 表单类型中存在隐藏的空白页面的问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8361>
- 解决 FormKit Array 表单类型无法支持图片多选的渲染问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8360>
- 解决在编辑器中复制或粘贴图片时首张图片会被覆盖的问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8333>
- 修复首次安装 Halo 之后，无法在文章编辑器中上传文件的问题 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8308>
- 解决 Array 组件空值渲染异常的问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8305>
- 解决 FormKit Sercet 表单类型 UI 过长且处于最后一行时会出现边框被遮挡的问题 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8268>
- 修复首页文章列表分页参数不为数字时渲染异常的问题 by @Copilot in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8374>
## 依赖更新
- 升级至 Spring Boot 4 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8291>
- 升级 PF4J 至 3.15.0 by @JohnNiang in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8294>
## 开发者相关
- 为 FormKit Arrary 表单类型适配 Halo 中的大部分组件并支持 Select 远程数据源 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8267>
- FormKit Iconify 支持设置尺寸参数，默认不再向用户显示尺寸设置选项 by @ruibaby in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8346>
- 为 FormKit Array 表单类型添加 slot 插槽类型 by @LIlGG in <https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/pull/8359>
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/halo-dev/halo/compare/v2.22.11...v2.23.0-beta.1
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the halo-dev/halo release v2.23.0-beta.1, the release note introduces new features including adding a scroll-to-top button on theme and plugin settings pages, adding an 'apply width to full text' function for images in the editor, supporting setting the number of articles displayed on the author page in article settings, and supporting article version comparison. Optimizations include allowing removal of the selected parent menu when creating a new menu item, applying reserved usernames to display names in system settings, adding a like count widget to the Console dashboard, and optimizing the default sorting of comment management in the Console to prioritize recently replied comments. Fixes include resolving a hidden blank page issue in FormKit Iconify form type, resolving FormKit Array form type inability to support image multi-select rendering, resolving the issue of the first image being overwritten when copying or pasting images in the editor, fixing inability to upload files in the article editor after first installing Halo, resolving Array component null value rendering exception, resolving FormKit Secret form type UI border obscuring when on the last line, and fixing abnormal rendering when the homepage article list pagination parameter is not a number. Dependency updates include upgrading to Spring Boot 4 and upgrading PF4J to 3.15.0. Developer-related changes include adapting FormKit Array form type to most components in Halo and supporting Select remote data sources, FormKit Iconify supporting size parameter settings and not displaying size options to users by default, and adding a slot type for FormKit Array form type.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the halo-dev/halo release v2.24.0, the release note introduces new features including improving the management functionality of the plugin details page, supporting plugin reloading in the Console plugin management, supporting direct selection of current roles when creating personal tokens, and supporting menu cloning. Optimizations include requiring verification when disabling/reconfiguring two-step authentication for enhanced security, supporting echoing the username after login failure, expanding the file type restrictions for uploading avatars, supporting binding multiple social accounts (same provider) for one user, and adding unsaved content prompts for theme and plugin settings. Fixes include fixing the issue where newly added configuration defaults may not take effect after theme updates, fixing a black line appearing when the Console input box is focused, fixing incorrect absolute path generation for attachments when the external access address ends with '/', fixing inability to set the author when creating an article, fixing incorrect display of alignment icons for image, video, and audio types in the editor, fixing missing theme upgrade permission when generating personal tokens with theme management permissions, fixing a large number of warning logs when attachment plugins do not implement thumbnail generation, and fixing potential failure of some plugins containing Finder API to start after upgrade. Developer-related changes include providing JWT authentication support, providing name variables for category and author archive pages, supporting automatic addition of version parameters to theme static resources, and fixing incorrect order of results obtained by theme through categoryFinder.getByNames and tagFinder.getByNames. Dependency updates include upgrading Spring Boot to 4.0.5.
